headline: Northern Trust Receives Approval for New EU Banking Branch in Ireland
summary: DUBLIN, June 15, 2026--Northern Trust announced today that it has received a licence from the Central Bank of Ireland for the establishment of The Northern Trust Company, Ireland Branch (Ireland Branch).
